the_coffee_trading.name: The Coffee Trading & Co.
the_coffee_trading.description: A modern specialty coffee café in Sarnath known for its premium coffee, desserts, and relaxed ambiance.
special_points: Best choice if you're specifically looking for coffee and café vibes.
Modern setup with specialty coffee, snacks, and desserts.
One of the highest-rated cafés in the area.

night_owl_cafe.name: NIGHT OWL CAFE
night_owl_cafe.description: A cozy café offering coffee, mocktails, pizzas, and quick bites with a comfortable atmosphere.
special_points: Great for coffee and evening hangouts.

veg_gali.name: Veg Gali
veg_gali.description: A popular vegetarian restaurant serving North Indian dishes and snacks in a family-friendly setting.

the_friends_table.name: The Friends Table
the_friends_table.description: A highly-rated restaurant known for its friendly service, quality food, and relaxed dining experience.
special_points: One of the highest-rated restaurants in Sarnath.

appam_cafe.name: Appam Cafe
appam_cafe.description: A South Indian restaurant offering authentic Kerala-style dishes and traditional flavors.
special_points: Best South Indian food option in Sarnath.

the_legacy.name: THE LEGACY (Restaurant and Cafe)
the_legacy.description: A restaurant and café located near major tourist attractions, offering a mix of Indian and café-style food.
special_points: Offers both meals and café-style refreshments.

red_palace.name: Red Palace
red_palace.description: A popular family restaurant serving both vegetarian and non-vegetarian North Indian cuisine in Sarnath.
special_points: Known for biryani and North Indian dishes.
Suitable for group dining and celebrations.

atithi_cafe_restaurant.name: Atithi Cafe and Restaurant
atithi_cafe_restaurant.description: A well-rated family restaurant offering Indian meals, snacks, and a comfortable dining experience.
special_points: Good for breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

maati_house.name: MAATI HOUSE
maati_house.description: A trendy restaurant with excellent reviews, offering a modern dining experience in Sarnath.
special_points: One of the highest-rated restaurants in the area.

shaakya_restaurant.name: Shaakya Restaurant
shaakya_restaurant.description: A multi-cuisine restaurant serving North Indian, Chinese, Continental, and South Indian dishes.
